qa_pair.question: Among all services that Jaeger has observed, how many distinct service names start with the prefix "api-"? Respond with an integer.
For the first service returned by jaeger_list_services (alphabetically), how many distinct operations has Jaeger recorded? Respond with an integer.
Take the 20 most recent traces for the service with the most operations. Among those traces, what is the maximum duration in microseconds? Respond with a numeric integer.

Search for traces where tags include http.status_code=500 on any service in the last 24 hours (use microseconds since epoch for start). How many traces are returned (limit=100)? Respond with an integer.
Take any trace returned by jaeger_search_traces. For that trace, what is the root span's service name? Respond with the exact service name string.
For the same trace, which service (by name) has the highest total_duration_us in the per-service breakdown? Respond with the service name.
Query jaeger_get_dependencies for the last 24 hours. Which service appears as the parent in the most distinct edges? Respond with the service name.
From jaeger_get_dependencies for the last 24 hours, what is the total call_count across all edges? Respond with an integer.
Find a trace (any) that has at least one span with tags["error"]="true". What is the operation name of the first error span (by start_time)? Respond with the operation name string.
Among recent traces for the first service, find the trace with the most spans (limit=20 search). How many spans does that trace contain? Respond with an integer.
